objective: Run a single-variable learning-rate experiment on the remote A40 by lowering Solution C to lr=3e-5 while keeping the linear scheduler and five-epoch best-checkpoint selection unchanged.

commands.train: ssh -p 22141 -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@194.68.245.210 'cd /workspace/NaturalLanguageUnderstandingCourseWork && ln -sf official_coursework/trial_data/ED_trial.csv test.csv && source .venv/bin/activate && mkdir -p experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_005 && export SOLUTION_C_EPOCHS=5 && export SOLUTION_C_LR=3e-5 && export SOLUTION_C_LR_SCHEDULER=linear && export SOLUTION_C_OUT_DIR=./outputs/deberta_v3_baseline_plain_trainer_5ep_lr3e5 && export SOLUTION_C_SAVE_DIR=./outputs/deberta_v3_baseline_plain_trainer_5ep_lr3e5/best_model && jupyter nbconvert --to notebook --execute solution_c_baseline_development.ipynb --output executed_solution_c_baseline.ipynb --output-dir experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_005 --ExecutePreprocessor.timeout=0 2>&1 | tee experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_005/stdout.log'
commands.evaluate: ssh -p 22141 -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@194.68.245.210 'cd /workspace/NaturalLanguageUnderstandingCourseWork && mkdir -p experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_005_probe && .venv/bin/python experiments/debug/solution_c_eval_probe.py --model-dir outputs/deberta_v3_baseline_plain_trainer_5ep_lr3e5/best_model --data-csv training_data/dev.csv --batch-size 32 --max-length 256 --json-out experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_005_probe/result.json --predictions-out experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_005_probe/dev_predictions.csv'

notes: Lowering the learning rate to 3e-5 completed cleanly on the remote A40 and still selected epoch 4 / checkpoint-5380 as the best checkpoint, but the direct evaluation probe showed clear regression against C_REMOTE_A40_003 on accuracy, macro_f1, binary_f1, and MCC.
